title: [TACZ] Refit | Recipe Editor
description: Adds a recipe editor for TACZ and addon weapons, attachments and ammo.
body:
# Description
TACZ Refit is a quality-of-life addon for the Timeless and Classics Zero Gun Mod designed for modpack creators to make editing weapons, ammo, and attachments significantly easier.

Instead of manually editing complicated config files or recipe setups, TACZ Refit provides a clean and easy-to-understand in-game interface that allows creators and modpack developers to customize their TACZ experience directly inside Minecraft just use /taczrefit and the interface opens.

Whether you want to rebalance progression, tweak attachments, or fully redesign weapon crafting, TACZ Refit makes the entire process faster, cleaner, and far more accessible.

# Features
- Easy-to-use in-game editor
- Edit/disable weapon, ammo and attachment recipes directly in Minecraft
- Designed for modpack creators and server owners
- Supports Timeless and Classics Zero addons
- Easy import/export your recipes and share it with others

# Bug Reports & Feedback
Found a bug or have ideas for improvements?
Than please report bugs and feedback in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/Ab8Z6H9cqS) server using the dedicated channels.

# Note: 
TACZ Refit is not affiliated with the official Timeless and Classics Zero developers.

Please do not report any bugs or issues related to TACZ Refit to them. All TACZ Refit bug reports, feedback, and support requests should be sent through our official support channels.
